remedies.name: Syzygium Jambolanum
remedies.note: Most perfect medicine for diabetes. Boericke: no other remedy causes in so marked a degree the diminution and disappearance of sugar in the urine.

remedies.name: Acidum Phosphoricum
remedies.note: Given as Acid Phos 6 + Uranium Nitricum 6.

remedies.name: Uranium Nitricum
remedies.note: Acid Phos 6 + Uranium Nit 6. K.M.: no other remedy so markedly reduces sugar in the urine.

raw_text: Diabities. Syzygium Jambolinum is the most perfect medicine for diabetes. Dr. Boericke says no other remedy causes in so marked degree the diminution and disappearance of sugar in the urine. Acid Phos 6 + Uranium Nitricum 6. K.M says no other remedy causes in so marked degree the diminution and disappearance of sugar in the urine.

remedies.name: Sepia / Murex
remedies.note: Discharge yellow in colour, foul smell, itching and burning. (written 'Sibia-murex')

remedies.name: Kreosotum
remedies.note: Discharge starts after pain subsides; yellow, stains clothes, foul smell; causes itching & burning where it touches the body.

remedies.name: Acidum Phosphoricum
remedies.note: For much weakness due to leucorrhoea / gonorrhoeal discharge etc.

remedies.name: Graphites
remedies.note: (listed 1x)

remedies.name: Arum (muriaticum?)
remedies.note: (listed 2x)

remedies.name: Natrum Muriaticum
remedies.note: (listed 3x, 'Nat mur')

remedies.name: Agaricus Muscarius
remedies.note: Leucorrhoea with excessive itching.

raw_text: Leucorrhoea. 1x discharge colour yellow, foul smell, itching and burning - Sepia/Murex. 2x pain subsides then discharge begins, yellow staining cloth, foul smell, itching & burning on skin - Kreosotum. 3x Acid Phos - white discharge / gonorrhoea etc causing much weakness; if leucorrhoea causes abortion then Electricus[?] ferri[?] ... Russian[?] remedy. 1x Graphites 2x Arum mur[?] 3x Nat mur. Agaricus muscarius - leucorrhoea with much itching.

remedies.name: Natrum Sulphuricum
remedies.note: Bio-chemic remedy for jaundice.

remedies.name: Chelidonium
remedies.note: 10 drops three times a day, for weakness.

remedies.name: China
remedies.note: With Myrica[?]; related to jaundice.

remedies.name: Oxalicum Acidum
remedies.note: For weakness.

remedies.name: Astacus Fluviatilis
remedies.note: Urticaria / nettle-rash, allergy, itching of skin, jaundice.

remedies.name: Carlsbad
remedies.note: Liver disorders, diabetes.

remedies.name: Chionanthus
remedies.note: Jaundice.

raw_text: Jaundice. Cholelithiasis[?], jaundice, excess bile. 1x Natrum Sulphuricum 6x (Bio-chemic). 2x Chelidonium - 10 drops three times a day for weakness. China 6 (Myrica[?] ...). Oxalicum Acid - for weakness. Berberis Aquifolium[?]. Astacus Fluviatilis - urticaria / allergy / skin itching / jaundice. Carlsbad - liver, diabetes. Carduus Marianus. Chionanthus - jaundice.

remedies.name: Lachesis
remedies.note: A sure cure for such a tropical eosinophilia.

remedies.name: Opium
remedies.note: Desire to escape, in fever.

remedies.name: Belladonna
remedies.note: Other medicine.

remedies.name: Veratrum Album
remedies.note: Other medicine.

raw_text: Eosinophilia. A disease showing increase above the normal number of eosinophils in the circulating blood or tissue. Patient takes a 'deep breath' resembling a long sigh, belaboured inspiration, chest constricted, aggravation during day time. Acute syndrome, often allergic; laboured respiration, asthmatic bronchial suffocations. 'Lachesis' is a sure cure for such a tropical eosinophilia. Desire to escape in fever - Opium; desire to escape in hysteria. Other medicines: Belladonna, Veratrum.

remedies.name: Anacardium
remedies.note: Examination fear in students.

remedies.name: Argentum Nitricum
remedies.note: Specific for examination funk; terror of anticipation. See also 'fright of examination'.

remedies.name: Gelsemium
remedies.note: For fussy children who are anxious about examinations in their school. (written 'Gels')

remedies.name: Silicea
remedies.note: Weak-hearted, irritable, lacks stamina, gives up hope, over-nervous in school examination.

remedies.name: Lycopodium
remedies.note: Depression about passing examination. See brain fog & depression / gloominess.

raw_text: Examination Fear. 1. Examination in student - 'Anacardium'. 2. Specific for examination funk, terror of anticipation (Arg. n). See fear under different heads and 'fright of examination'. Examination fussy children - Gelsemium ('Gels'). Examination nervousness: 1. weak-hearted, irritable, lacks stamina, gives up hope, over-nervous - Silicea. 2. depression about passing examination - Lycopodium.

remedies.name: Mercurius Corrosivus
remedies.note: Blood dysentery, tenesmus relieved by passing stool; hot bloody slimy offensive stool with cutting pain and shreds of mucous membrane; tenesmus of rectum extends to bladder, constant urging for urination and stool. Symptoms appear suddenly and vehemently. (Merc Cor)

remedies.name: Nux Vomica
remedies.note: Compare with Merc Cor.

remedies.name: Terminalia Chebula (Haritaki / हरड़)
remedies.note: Bleeding piles, diarrhoea, chronic dysentery, constipation, colic, headache, vertigo, dropsy and some skin diseases - found efficacious.

raw_text: Blood dysentery, tenesmus relieved by passing of stool; stool hot, bloody, slimy (muddy), offensive with cutting pains and shreds of mucous membrane. Must be tenesmus/urging of bladder and rectum at same time, urine passing in drops with much pain. Tenesmus of rectum extends to bladder so that Merc Cor may act or vice versa; constant urging for urination and stool. Merc Cor has intense symptoms appearing suddenly and vehemently (compare Nux vom). - Merc Cor. Terminalia Chebula (Haritaki) - bleeding piles, diarrhoea, chronic dysentery, constipation, colic, headache, vertigo, dropsy, some skin diseases. Calc phos[?].

remedies.name: Thuja
remedies.note: Specific; 1M dilution every week, later once a month.

remedies.name: Berberis (tincture)
remedies.note: 10 drops in a cup of warm water after every three hours.

remedies.name: Bacillus Coli
remedies.note: Dr. Ghosh: B Coli in 20th or 30th potency may be given.

remedies.name: Methylene Blue
remedies.note: Dr. Ghosh recommends Methylene blue in 6th potency.

raw_text: B-Coli. 1. Thuja is specific, 1M dilution every week, later on once a month. 2. Tincture Berberis 10 drops may be given in a cup of warm water after every three hours. 3. According to Dr. Ghosh, B Coli in 20th or 30th potency may be given; he recommends Methylene blue in 6th potency.

remedies.name: Thuja
remedies.note: Start treatment with Thuja; mother tincture applied externally morning and evening.

remedies.name: Radium Bromatum
remedies.note: Once a week along with Thuja; on that day Thuja should not be given. (written 'Radium Brome')

remedies.name: Vaccininum
remedies.note: 200 dilution as an intercurrent remedy once a fortnight; no other medicine that day. See freckles, spots, yellow face.

raw_text: Birth mark. 1. Treatment to be started with 'Thuja', the mother tincture applied externally morning and evening. 2. Radium Brome once a week along with Thuja; on that day Thuja should not be given. 3. Vaccininum 200 dilution as an intercurrent remedy once a fortnight; no other medicine that day. See freckles, spots and yellow sadden[?] face.

remedies.name: Natrum Muriaticum
remedies.note: Three doses taken by women on the 1st, 2nd, 3rd day after cessation of the monthly course; repeat after every menses while conception is not desired.

remedies.name: Pulsatilla
remedies.note: Taken four days continuously before the regular date of menstruation is sufficient to prevent conception.

remedies.name: Testis
remedies.note: Dr. Banerjee: 3 grains twice daily for seven days from day of cessation of menstruation each month; in many cases prevents pregnancy. A kind of nosode.

remedies.name: Cyclamen
remedies.note: M.T 5 drops for 7-10 consecutive days from the day after cessation of menstruation; prevents conception.

remedies.name: Xanthoxylum
remedies.note: M.T 5 drops, alternative to Cyclamen; prevents conception. See oral contraceptive.

raw_text: Birth Control. A. Three doses of Nat. m. 200 taken by women on the first, second and third day after cessation of the monthly course; must be repeated after every menses till conception is not desired. B. If Puls 200 is taken four days continuously before the regular date of menstruation it will be sufficient to prevent conception. C. Dr. Banerjee: 1. Testis 3x, 3 grains twice daily for seven days from day of cessation of menstruation each month - prevents pregnancy (a kind of nosode). 2. Cyclamen M.T 5 drops or Xanthoxylum M.T 5 drops for 7-10 consecutive days from day after cessation of menstruation - prevent conception. See oral contraceptive.

remedies.name: Arsenicum Album
remedies.note: (listed 1x)

remedies.name: Sulphur
remedies.note: (listed 2x)

remedies.name: Sepia
remedies.note: (listed 3x)

remedies.name: Natrum Muriaticum
remedies.note: (listed 4x)

remedies.name: Thuja
remedies.note: (listed 5x)

remedies.name: Causticum
remedies.note: One dose. For hair falling out from the roots (बाल जड़ बीच से उड़ जाएं).

remedies.name: Equisetum
remedies.note: Three times a day.

remedies.name: Vinca Minor
remedies.note: For hair fall (बाल उड़ता है).

remedies.name: Acidum Phosphoricum
remedies.note: With Selenium 30, four times a day.

remedies.name: Selenium
remedies.note: With Acid phos 30, four times a day.

raw_text: Eczema / Hair. 1x Arsenic alb 1M, 2x Sulphur 1M, 3x Sepia 1M, 4x Nat mur 1M, 5x Thuja 1M. Hair falling from roots: 1x Causticum 1M one dose, 2x Equisetum 30 three times a day, Vinca minor. Hair falls: 1x Acid phos 30 + 2x Selenium 30, four times a day. Calendula officinalis.

condition: Urinary complaints (dribbling urine, blood in urine, urinal trouble, high B.P., spleen)

remedies.name: Sulphur
remedies.note: 1 dose, once a month (for urine dribbling drop by drop).

remedies.name: Sepia
remedies.note: 1 dose, once a month.

remedies.name: Natrum Muriaticum
remedies.note: 1 dose, once a month.

remedies.name: Vinca
remedies.note: Four times a day.

remedies.name: Selenium
remedies.note: Four times a day.

remedies.name: Phosphorus
remedies.note: If the above fail.

remedies.name: Antimonium Tartaricum
remedies.note: For blood passed with urine (context Hindi).

remedies.name: Cascara Sagrada
remedies.note: Retention of urine / urinary passage trouble.

remedies.name: Berberis
remedies.note: Urinal trouble / spleen / high B.P. (listed 1x)

remedies.name: Damiana
remedies.note: (listed 2x)

remedies.name: Frangula
remedies.note: (listed 3x)

remedies.name: Ceanothus
remedies.note: (listed 4x)

raw_text: Urine dribbles drop by drop. 1x Sulphur 200 1 dose, 2x Sepia 200 1 dose, 3x Nat mur 200 1 dose (once a month). 4x Vinca 30, 5x Selenium 30 (four times a day). If fails, Phosphorus 200. Blood with urine - Antim tart[?]. Retention of urine / urinary passage - Cascara Sagrada Mixture. Urinal trouble / Spleen / B.P. High: 1x Berberis Q, 2x Damiana Q, 3x Frangula Q, 4x Ceanothus Q. Mancinella[?].
